about_text: Since 1979, Joe Pucci’s appreciation for his craft has been demonstrated with the East Bay’s most sought-after homes of exquisite design and workmanship. Redefining the art of home building, each TradeMark property is a masterpiece showcasing a unique blend of quality, innovative style and functional living space. name: Xfactor.io
location: 37 Alamo Square Dr F, Alamo, CA 94507, USA
meta_description: Xfactor.io uses causal AI to uncover the hidden drivers of revenue growth, helping RevOps and CRO teams identify high-impact actions and turn data into clear execution plans.
hero_text: Xfactor surfaces the cheat codes hidden in your revenue data.
headings: Built to uncover what actually moves the number
Trusted by industries across the country
You don’t have a data problem. You have a noise problem.
about_text: Stop drowning in dashboards. Our AI agents pinpoint the few small changes that materially move your revenue number and turn them into a clear order of attack. Because growth isn't missing—it’s just hidden. Powered by Causal AI and our RevOps Graph, we reveal how planning and execution cascade through your revenue engine to turn guesswork into engineering outcomes. Xfactor is a causal AI built for CRO and RevOps teams. Instead of reporting on performance, it explains why revenue moves the way it does. It analyzes cause and effect across your go to market execution and isolates the specific drivers behind outcomes. Those drivers are ranked by impact, so teams know where to focus first.
services: Built to uncover what actually moves the number
Trusted by industries across the country
You don’t have a data problem. You have a noise problem.
Results you can see. Decisions you can trust.

name: Herzog Insurance
location: 29 Alamo Square Dr, Alamo, CA 94507, USA
about_text: Founded in 1979 Herzog Insurance Agency insures over 8,000 Families and more than 1,500 local businesses. Offering outstanding customer service that puts the needs of the client first has made Herzog Insurance one of the top Farmers Insurance Agencies. Our experienced associates will advise you on insurance products that give you the best protection and value. We are licensed to sell in more than 15 states for personal and business insurance to accommodate our customers. Call us today for a FREE consultation at (925) 734-0530. Our goal since the founding of our agency in 1979 has been to service the customer with better than expected service. We are committed to having a long term relationship with our clients. Some of our Personal Lines and Commercial Accounts have been with us since 1979. Our customer retention is one of the best in the industry. Not wanting to limit the services offered, Herzog Insurance Agency is comprised of four different departments: Personal Lines Department: We service the Auto, Home and Umbrella needs of our clients. Need an Earthquake Policy to protect the equity in your home or a flood policy to protect your property, we can provide that coverage. If you own a motor home or recreational vehicles we can help there also. Commercial Department: We service the insurance needs of Business Owners. Recently our agency was recognized as the #1 Commercial Agency with Farmers Insurance out of 15,000 Agencies nationwide for Excellence in sales and service. If it’s General Liability, Workers’ Compensation, Commercial Vehicle Insurance or a Fidelity Bond we can meet your insurance needs. Our commitment to our business owners is one that is taken very seriously from the issuing of Certificates of Insurance to Claims follow up.

name: Lever Coffee
location: 37 Alamo Square Dr, Alamo, CA 94507, USA
page_title: Lever Coffee - Artisan Coffee & Bakery | Alamo, Danville, Walnut Creek
meta_description: Artisan Coffee & Bakery serving Alamo, Danville, Walnut Creek CA. We use hand-built Lever Press machines to brew our espresso & in-house pastries every morning.
headings: Great coffee, real food, handmade mugs
So grab a cup, stay for a while
about_text: Long before there were machines pumping out espresso with one push of a button, baristas were making truly handcrafted drinks by perfecting the art of the lever press pull. That’s why our talented baristas put a lot of love (and a little bit of elbow grease!) into making our signature drinks the old-fashioned way—by using lever press machines to perfect the rate of extraction and craft coffee that is full-bodied and full-flavored. Because community is at the heart of what we do, we’re committed to crafting a café atmosphere where conversation flows just as freely as our handcrafted drinks do. So grab a seat, call up a friend, and start up a conversation. Because when you combine the perfect location with the perfect beans and the perfect pull— You’ve got a recipe for good vibes. Lever is named for the hand-crafted manual lever espresso presses we use to craft our signature drinks. From the jump, we knew we wanted to do things a little differently. Our mission is simple - refine your coffee ritual with sustainable beans in a handcrafted mug and a side of good vibes. Trust us, you’ve never had it so good. Someone’s dad or uncle or grandma or whoever, at some point said, "Do it right or don't do it all." Our beans are sourced from sustainable growers and local roasters direct to our morning sippers.

name: Hi-Definition Barbershop Alamo/Danville
location: 9 Alamo Square Dr, Alamo, CA 94507, USA
page_title: Hi-Definition Barbershop | Barbershop in Walnut Creek & Danville
meta_description: Hi-Definition Barbershop offers premium men's haircuts in Walnut Creek and Danville, known for consistent quality, elevated service, and a strong culture for clients and barbers.
about_text: Hi, I’m Max, the owner of Hi-Definition Barbershop. I started cutting hair at 15 as a sophomore in high school, and I’ve been honing my craft for more than half my life. This barbershop and the Hi-Definition brand mean everything to me. I’ve poured my heart and soul into this shop and into the incredible team we’ve built over the past decade. Barbering isn’t just what I do, it’s truly who I am. There’s nothing in this world that could ever take me away from it. The opportunity to work with a team as passionate as the guys we have here is what keeps me going every single day. We’ve created a space that’s not only about our tailored haircuts but a welcoming, genuine experience. A great haircut starts with a vision. Our barbers are passionate about their craft, bringing years of experience and precision to every style. From the latest trends to timeless classics, we take pride in delivering a look that enhances your confidence and personal style. Let us redefine your grooming experience, because every great haircut begins with a vision.

meta_description: We are proud to be family owned and operated for more than 30 years. Our story begins in 1991 with one station in Baldwin Park, CA
about_text: Founded in 2012 in Las Vegas, Nevada, Rebel is a customer-centric retailer focused on creating a next generation customer experience by providing clean facilities, contemporary design, and innovative product offerings. We pride ourselves in being a destination where you can get bean to cup coffee for your morning commutes, fresh-made pizza and tacos for lunch, and craft beers to go for your Friday night drinks. We are family-owned, community-centered, value-oriented, and most importantly, steadfast in serving our customers. Rebel has over 500 locations across the United States and is constantly growing. We are committed to technology, sustainability and constant evolution to meet the fast-paced demand of the future. At Rebel we believe in having “Your Store, Your Way.” Elevate our customer’s experience in unexpected, interactive, innovative ways without compromising the basics of convenience shopping. To have employees who are genuinely connected to their customers and their communities.
